title: Ecgberht becomes King of Mercia
fact: Ecgberht, also spelled Egbert, Ecgbert, Ecgbriht, Ecgbeorht, and Ecbert, was King of Wessex from 802 until his death in 839.

title: Edgar of England becomes King of Mercia
fact: Edgar, also known as Edgar the Peaceful, the Peacemaker and the Peaceable, was King of the English from 959 until his death in 975.

title: Offa of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Offa was King of Mercia, a kingdom of Anglo-Saxon England, from 757 until his death in 796.

title: Penda of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Penda was a 7th-century king of Mercia, the Anglo-Saxon kingdom in what is today the Midlands.

title: Æthelbald of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Æthelbald was the King of Mercia, in what is now the English Midlands from 716 until he was killed in 757.

title: Coenwulf becomes King of Mercia
fact: Coenwulf was the king of Mercia from December 796 until his death in 821.

title: Burgred of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Burgred was an Anglo-Saxon king of Mercia from 852 to 874.

title: Æthelred of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Æthelred was king of Mercia from 675 until 704.

title: Wulfhere of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Wulfhere or Wulfar was King of Mercia from 658 until 675 AD.

title: Beornwulf of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Beornwulf was the King of Mercia, a kingdom of Anglo-Saxon England, from 823 until his death in 826.

title: Ceolwulf I of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Ceolwulf I was the King of Mercia, a kingdom of Anglo-Saxon England, from 821 until his deposition in 823.

title: Wiglaf of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Wiglaf was King of Mercia from 827 to 829 and again from 830 until his death in 839.

title: Ecgfrith of Mercia becomes King of Mercia
fact: Ecgfrith was king of Mercia from 29 July to December 796.
